MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-25-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DANIEL IBARGUEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE - INSUFFICIENT INFORMATION. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
